# Killawot

> Engineering Intelligent Systems. AI automation consultancy and full-stack development.

Killawot is a London-based AI automation consultancy with 20+ years of engineering experience. We build agent systems, LLM integrations, and cloud-native applications for global brands including Collinson Group, BBC iPlayer, The Times, and Superdry.

## Services

- [Agent & Automation Systems](/services/) — Custom AI agents, LLM-integrated workflows, RAG pipelines, and multi-agent orchestration.
- [AI Audits & Readiness Assessment](/services/) — Maturity assessments, risk reviews of existing AI, and exec-ready roadmaps with ROI projections.
- [Full-Stack Development](/services/) — Production-grade Node.js, React, and API development. 20+ years across major global brands.
- [Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure](/services/) — AWS-native architecture: serverless, containers, event-driven distributed systems.

## Work

- [Portfolio & Case Studies](/work/) — Selected projects for Collinson Group, BBC iPlayer, The Times, Superdry, and more.

## Insights

- [How AI Automation Can Transform Your Business Operations](/insights/ai-automation-transform-operations/)
